end,function(D,U)local h=F(U)local C=function()return G(D,{},U,h)end return C end,function(D,U)local h=F(U)local C=function(C,d,R,k,u)return G(D,{C,d;R,k;u},U,h)end return C end,function(D,U)local h=F(U)local C=function(...)return G(D,{...},U,h)end return C end,function(D,U)local h=F(U)local C=function(C,d,R,k,u,m,j,J)return G(D,{C,d,R,k;u,m,j;J},U,h)end return C end,function(D,U)local
